flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College at Plattsburgh rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.1k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY College at Plattsburgh fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (50.5% → 43.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY College at Plattsburgh fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3k → 3.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College at Plattsburgh fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
